name: Glad you came to join the party, but this big fella is being a bit smartie! - Planned bot
description:
Showcase of planned bot, and yes, it's gonna be based on DR-CYBER's Untitled Christmas Song with lyrics. You can chat with it, the only EXEs in here is Lord X and Tails Doll.

"Is this the closure that I would always need?"

Also, planning also to do the jenga video. Where, y'know, Lord X loves jenga. And Fleetway can't jerk off in peace.

ALSO ALSO, this mf (Lord X) will throw whatever he finds at you if you call him grandpa. A clear reference to the Lord X and Zalgo video.

The guardians (X's guardians) aren't mentioned.
creator: The_Dukester
